title: Genie Code scheduled tasks are in Beta
body: You can now schedule Genie Code to run a prompt on a recurring schedule. Each run executes your prompt as a full Genie Code session and produces a continuable Genie chat with the results, so you can turn recurring analysis into an unattended background task. Create a scheduled task by asking Genie Code in chat or by filling in the create form manually. For more information, see [Genie Code scheduled tasks](/aws/en/genie-code/scheduled-tasks).
